description_long: This skyscraper features a tall, rectangular main tower with a secondary, slightly offset upper section that rises above the main structure. The facade is dominated by a grid of dark, horizontal and vertical lines, creating a checkerboard pattern of windows and structural elements. The upper section is set back from the main facade, giving the building a distinctive tiered profile. The exterior appears to be clad in dark glass and metal, with a uniform, modernist appearance. The building's massing is simple and geometric, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. No visible signage or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a sleek, corporate aesthetic.
description: A modern, tiered skyscraper with a dark grid facade and a setback upper section, featuring a uniform checkerboard window pattern and sleek, minimal design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main rectangular facade with the upper section set back and the grid window pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the setback upper section and the continuous grid pattern along the building's side.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same grid facade and setback upper section visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the tiered profile and the consistent window grid along the side.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is composed of dark glass panels framed by a regular grid of metal or concrete mullions, creating a strong geometric pattern. The setback upper section and lack of ornamentation emphasize a sleek, corporate look.
